description: [ELON] Create WebhookManager service to auto-register Shopify webhooks on installation. After OAuth callback succeeds, call Shopify API to create webhooks for orders/create, orders/updated, products/update pointing to /api/shopify/webhooks/orders and /api/shopify/webhooks/products. Store webhook IDs in shopify_credentials table. Handle webhook registration failures gracefully (log error, allow manual retry).
successCriteria: Webhooks auto-register after successful OAuth installation
Webhook IDs stored in shopify_credentials.webhooks_json field
Registration failures logged to activity_log with ERROR level
Manual retry mechanism available via Settings UI or API endpoint
